thag2.36:1.3: dispassionate for things that spark passion,
thag2.36:1.4: unprovoked by things that spark provocation?
thag2.36:1.5: When one’s mind is developed like this,
thag2.36:1.6: from where can there come to him suffering & stress?

thag2.36:2.4: unprovoked by things that spark provocation.
thag2.36:2.5: When my mind is developed like this,
thag2.36:2.6: from where can there come to me suffering & stress?
